title.en: Botswana Fastener Supplier: Mining & Construction Hardware in Gaborone
title.zh: 博茨瓦纳紧固件供应商：哈博罗内和弗朗西斯敦的采矿和建筑五金

description.en: Botswana fastener supplier for diamond mining and construction. Hardware in Gaborone, Francistown, Maun. Shipping via Durban (South Africa). Factory prices with BOBS certified products available.
description.zh: 博茨瓦纳紧固件供应商，供应钻石开采和建筑。为哈博罗内、弗朗西斯敦、马翁提供五金。通过德班（南非）运输。可提供BOBS认证产品的工厂价格。

keywords: Botswana fastener supplier, Gaborone hardware wholesaler, Francistown mining fasteners, Botswana diamond mining, BOBS certified, SADC fastener import, construction hardware Botswana, diamond mining bolts Botswana

heading.en: Botswana: Africa's Diamond Giant with Growing Construction
heading.zh: 博茨瓦纳：拥有不断增长的建筑业的非洲钻石巨头

body.en: Botswana is the world's largest diamond producer by value and home to major mining operations in Orapa, Jwaneng, and Lerala. The country's stable economy and strategic location in Southern Africa make it an ideal distribution hub. While landlocked, Botswana imports primarily through South Africa's Durban port and Gaborone's neighboring borders. TradeGo Fasteners supplies Botswana's mining companies (diamonds, copper, nickel) and construction sector with high-quality fasteners at competitive factory prices.
body.zh: 博茨瓦纳是世界上钻石价值最大的生产国，在奥拉帕、朱瓦能和莱拉拉设有大型采矿作业。该国稳定的经济和在南部非洲的战略位置使其成为理想的分销中心。作为内陆国家，博茨瓦纳主要通过南非德班港和哈博罗内邻近边境进口。TradeGo紧固件为博茨瓦纳的矿业公司和建筑行业提供有竞争力的工厂价格的优质紧固件。

heading.en: Shipping to Botswana: Via South Africa
heading.zh: 运送到博茨瓦纳：通过南非

body.en: Botswana is landlocked and borders South Africa, Namibia, Zimbabwe, and Zambia. Main import route: Durban Port (South Africa) to Gaborone by road (8-10 hours from Durban, 320km). Alternative routes via Johannesburg: RAMgat (Transnet) rail to Gaborone or road transport. We handle all export documentation including SADC (Southern African Development Community) trade requirements and can assist with Botswana import permits.
body.zh: 博茨瓦纳是内陆国家，与南非、纳米比亚、津巴布韦和赞比亚接壤。主要进口路线是德班港到哈博罗内公路，约320公里车程8-10小时。替代路线可通过约翰内斯堡的RAMgat铁路或公路运输到哈博罗内。我们处理所有SADC贸易合规文件，可协助办理博茨瓦纳进口许可证。

heading.zh: 博茨瓦纳行业的紧固件

rows: High-tensile bolts, rock bolts, conveyor hardware

q.en: How long does shipping to Gaborone take?
q.zh: 到哈博罗内的运输时间是多少?

a.en: Sea freight to Durban takes 20-25 days, then road transport to Gaborone is 8-10 hours. Total approximately 28-32 days door to door.
a.zh: 海运到德班需要20-25天，然后公路运输到哈博罗内8-10小时。门到门总共约28-32天。

a.en: We can provide documentation for BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) requirements and SADC trade compliance.
a.zh: 我们可以提供BOBS博茨瓦纳标准局要求的文件以及SADC贸易合规文件。

q.en: Can you deliver to Francistown and Maun?
q.zh: 您可以送到弗朗西斯敦和马翁吗?

a.en: Yes, we deliver throughout Botswana including Francistown, Maun, Kasane, and all major mining locations.
a.zh: 是的，我们向博茨瓦纳全境发货，包括弗朗西斯敦、马翁、卡萨内和所有主要采矿地点。
